steps.title: Spot the inevitable outcome
steps.content: The passage states that natural selection was the “obvious next step” given the intellectual context of 1800s British science—signaling something that inevitably follows from the circulating ideas.

steps.title: Bridge the logical consequence
steps.content:
Then matches the signal because it expresses a logical consequence: the inevitable next step established in sentence 1 logically leads to the parallel discovery described in sentence 2.

The other choices fail to establish this consequence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
